helpful: The snapshot exposed the requested-response signal and current briefing posture.
The petition text included the questions, grant arguments, and appended lower-court opinions.
The statpack supplied paid-petition, Fourth Circuit, relist, and CVSG calibration cuts.
CourtListener search identified the small set of relevant EDR authorities.
gaps: A response-request base-rate cut would materially improve calibration for this petition stage.
CourtListener full-opinion retrieval was throttled after searches succeeded.
The corpus query filters could not retrieve close subject-matter analogues.
notes: The two corpus queries required 351 ranged GETs and about 91 MB for broad priors. The forthcoming brief in opposition was not yet due and therefore was not a provisioned input.
